# GitHub Configuration Files

This directory contains GitHub-specific templates and workflows:

## Workflows
- `workflows/ci.yml` - Continuous Integration pipeline (test, build, audit)

## Templates
- `PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` - PR submission checklist
- `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md` - Bug report form
- `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md` - Feature request form

## Usage

These files are automatically used by GitHub when:
- Creating pull requests
- Opening issues
- Running CI/CD on push/PR

No manual setup required after pushing to GitHub.
